description: As part of a security audit project, an analyst needs to run an authenticated scan on internal servers to find vulnerabilities and missing patches.

nodes.task_description: Get temporary domain administrator credentials from the client to perform the authenticated scan.

expected_outcome.value: The analyst has the necessary credentials.

nodes.task_description: Configure and run an internal vulnerability scan against the client's servers.
Analyze the results and generate a prioritized list of vulnerabilities to be remediated.

expected_outcome.value: A clear, actionable vulnerability report is created as part of the audit deliverable.
